agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT to wrong number; transaction TXN-9101 completed to +8801719876543. Claims recipient not responding and requests recovery.
recommended_next_action: Verify transaction details, open a wrong‑transfer investigation per dispute resolution SOP, attempt to contact the recipient, and if funds are recoverable initiate reversal; update ticket and escalate as needed.
customer_reply: We have logged your request regarding TXN-9101 and are reviewing the transfer. Our team will investigate the wrong number issue and contact the recipient if possible. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Customer claims TXN-9202 (2000 BDT) was sent to the wrong person and requests reversal; evidence shows multiple prior transfers to the same recipient, making the claim inconsistent.
recommended_next_action: Initiate a detailed investigation per dispute_resolution procedure, verify transaction details, and attempt to contact the recipient for possible reversal; document findings and escalate if needed.
customer_reply: We have received your request to reverse TXN-9202. Our team will investigate the transfer and contact the recipient if possible; any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Customer reports that payment of 1200 BDT (TXN-9301) failed but balance was deducted. Evidence shows transaction status failed, indicating a possible pending deduction.
recommended_next_action: Verify the failed transaction TXN-9301 in the payments system, check for any pending settlement, and if eligible initiate a refund through official channels per payments_ops procedure; document findings and update ticket.
customer_reply: We have noted your payment attempt TXN-9301 that failed while showing a deduction. Our team is investigating the transaction and will ensure any eligible amount is returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

agent_summary: Customer requests a refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 (payment to MERCHANT-7821) stating they changed their mind; evidence shows the transaction is completed.
recommended_next_action: Verify refund eligibility per merchant policy, initiate investigation of TXN-9401, and update ticket with findings before any reversal.
customer_reply: We have received your request regarding TXN-9401 for 500 BDT. Our team will review the transaction and applicable merchant policy. If the refund is eligible, any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone

agent_summary: Customer reports receiving a phone call claiming to be from bKash asking for OTP and threatening account block; customer did not share any information. No transaction ID found; evidence insufficient for further transaction analysis.
recommended_next_action: Log the phishing incident, flag the account for monitoring, and initiate standard fraud risk protocol to educate the customer on security practices and watch for any suspicious activity.
customer_reply: We have recorded your report of a suspicious call requesting your OTP. Do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. bKash will never ask for these details via phone. If you notice any unauthorized activity, contact us immediately.

agent_summary: Customer reports an issue with their money but provides no specific transaction; analysis found insufficient data and no transaction ID identified.
recommended_next_action: Request clarification on the specific transaction (date, amount, reference) and review recent activity (TXN-9601, TXN-9602) to investigate the discrepancy; log the investigation.
customer_reply: We have noted your recent transactions TXN-9601 (cash‑in) and TXN‑9602 (transfer). To investigate the issue, please provide the date, amount, or reference of the transaction you are concerned about. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

agent_summary: Customer reports cash‑in of 2000 BDT via agent (TXN-9701) this morning but balance shows no credit; evidence shows transaction is pending.
recommended_next_action: Verify pending status of TXN-9701 with the agent, check settlement logs, and if unresolved escalate to agent operations for further investigation.
customer_reply: আপনার TXN-9701 ক্যাশ‑ইনটি বর্তমানে পেন্ডিং অবস্থায় রয়েছে, আমরা এজেন্টের সঙ্গে যাচাই করছি। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না। কোনো যোগ্য পরিমাণ অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলের মাধ্যমে ফেরত দেওয়া হবে।

agent_summary: Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer to brother not received; multiple recent transactions (TXN-9801, TXN-9802, TXN-9803) could match the claim.
recommended_next_action: Request clarification of the recipient phone number or exact transfer time, then verify the identified transaction and investigate its status per dispute_resolution procedure.
customer_reply: We see several recent transfers of 1000 BDT. Could you confirm the recipient’s phone number or the exact time of the transfer? This will help us locate the correct transaction. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

agent_summary: Merchant reports settlement of BDT 15,000 (TXN-9901) not received; system shows TXN-9901 pending since 2026-04-13.
recommended_next_action: Verify settlement processing for TXN-9901, check for any processing delays, and if unresolved within SLA, escalate to finance team for further investigation.
customer_reply: We have noted your settlement of BDT 15,000 (TXN-9901) is still pending. Our team is reviewing the status and will update you shortly. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

agent_summary: Customer reports being charged twice for an 850 BDT electricity bill; evidence shows duplicate completed payments TXN-10001 and TXN-10002.
recommended_next_action: Verify both transactions, initiate duplicate payment investigation per payments_ops procedure, and process reversal/credit of the duplicate amount through official channels.
customer_reply: We have identified two payments of 850 BDT (TXN-10001 and TXN-10002) for your electricity bill. Our team is reviewing the duplicate and will ensure any eligible amount is returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
